//: EAS Build profiles for Cleanway mobile. Audit finding mobile-eas-missing HIGH — without this file `eas build -p ios|android` fails and TestFlight/Play Store distribution is blocked.

build.//: `development` builds an unsigned IPA/APK for the Expo Go-equivalent dev client. Use this for VPN debugging where the Expo Go sandbox is too restrictive (Network Extension entitlement isn't available in Expo Go).
build.//preview: `preview` is the TestFlight / Play Internal Testing track — signed but distributed to a small allowlist. Auto-increment is on so internal-test builds don't collide on the same version number.
build.//production: App Store / Play Store. Auto-increments build number so a re-submit with the same semver version still passes Apple/Google validation. Same EXPO_PUBLIC_* envs as preview — the API URL doesn't change between TestFlight and the real store. Supabase anon keys are public-by-design (gated server-side by RLS); if a secret-flavoured value is added later, move it to EAS Secrets and reference via $EAS_SECRET_NAME.
